hooks.command: bash -lc 'git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git commit -m "chore: auto-save wiki $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z)" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git push >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; true'
